---

## Problem Statement

Describe the problem or limitation you are facing.

## Proposed Solution

Describe the change you would like to see.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or workarounds.

## Example API

If relevant, include a proposed API shape or usage example.

## Additional Context

Any additional details that may help maintainers evaluate the request.
